finding: IN-SAMPLE, structure-only reconstruction Hits@10 = 0.280 exceeds frequency 0.206 (the same words recur, so in-sample they are 'recoverable') — BUT this is OVERFITTING: out-of-sample (Phase P) structure does not beat frequency. The residual is NOT generalizably recoverable from structure; it is irreducible specificity
out_of_sample_basis: Phase P: held-out, co-occurrence structure does NOT beat frequency (info-gain -3.32 bits, 0/7 regimes) — in-sample recovery is overfitting
